articles.title: Board a lobster boat and dine on your catch while staying at this Boston hotel
articles.description:
Travelers can book the experience now.

The post Board a lobster boat and dine on your catch while staying at this Boston hotel appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Travelers can now book lobster boat experiences at the Lenox Hotel in Boston.
Guests can catch and dine on their lobster catch during their stay.
This unique offering enhances Boston's appeal as a seafood destination for visitors.

articles.title: Red Line car shells cleared from customs, reviving replacement project
articles.description:
The clearance allows manufacturing to restart, bringing back over 140 furloughed employees.

The post Red Line car shells cleared from customs, reviving replacement project appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Line car shells cleared customs, allowing manufacturing to resume.
Over 140 furloughed employees will return to work on the project.
The replacement project aims to improve Boston's public transit reliability.

articles.title: Trump administration sues Harvard, saying it violated civil rights law and seeking to recover funds
articles.description:
The lawsuit, filed in federal court in Massachusetts, is another missive in a protracted battle between the administration of President Donald Trump and Harvard.

The post Trump administration sues Harvard, saying it violated civil rights law and seeking to recover funds appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Trump administration files lawsuit against Harvard in federal court in Massachusetts.
Lawsuit claims Harvard violated civil rights law and seeks to recover unspecified funds.
Potential implications for local students and funding in Boston's higher education landscape.

articles.title: He’s running the 2026 Boston Marathon to fight addiction stigma
articles.description:
North Easton’s Kevin Hayden is racing with Learn to Cope, honoring loved ones lost and supporting families navigating recovery.

The post He’s running the 2026 Boston Marathon to fight addiction stigma appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Kevin Hayden from North Easton is running the 2026 Boston Marathon.
He supports Learn to Cope, a group aiding families in recovery.
Hayden aims to reduce addiction stigma and honor lost loved ones.

articles.title: Social media celeb Alix Earle returned to Harvard this week
articles.description:
"Such an inspiring day to hear from all the students on what they are building and get to brainstorm alongside them."

The post Social media celeb Alix Earle returned to Harvard this week appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Social media influencer Alix Earle visited Harvard to engage with students on March 20.
Earle expressed inspiration from students' projects and collaborative brainstorming.
Her visit highlights Harvard's focus on entrepreneurship and student innovation.

articles.title: ‘There’s nothing compared to that feeling’: Red Sox players discussed return from World Baseball Classic
articles.description:
"I enjoyed every single second, every single part of it. I soaked that in, and it was the best."

The post ‘There’s nothing compared to that feeling’: Red Sox players discussed return from World Baseball Classic appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox players returned energized from the World Baseball Classic, enhancing team morale.
Players expressed joy and appreciation for the experience, emphasizing its significance.
Local fans can expect a more motivated team in the upcoming season.

articles.title: Marlon Wayans stopped by this South Boston restaurant for lunch
articles.description:
"WE ATE GOOD!!!"

summary: Marlon Wayans visited a South Boston restaurant for lunch on March 20, 2026.

Local businesses benefit from celebrity visits, boosting foot traffic and sales.
